problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Combining Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
